# Repair and Refinish Bodyworks (Portfolio Demo)

This is a portfolio demonstration website built to show a fast, modern car body repair site for Kent. It is not the live production website.

- [Home](https://repair-refinish.vercel.app/)
- [Gallery](https://repair-refinish.vercel.app/gallery)
- [About](https://repair-refinish.vercel.app/about)
- [Car body repair service](https://repair-refinish.vercel.app/services/car-repair)
- [Live business website](https://repair-refinish.co.uk/)

## Services

Car body repair, insurance repairs, paintless dent removal, SMART repair, headlight refurbishment, and EV/hybrid bodywork. Based in Manston, Kent.

## Contact

Phone: 07550 200000. Email: info@repair-refinish.co.uk.
